assertions.text: Executive summary leads with the financial structure and the investment ask
Risk factors section names at least two material risks
Speculative financial projections are clearly labelled as projections

leads-with-financials.note: Executive summary opens with budget, confirmed financing, and amount sought

risk-factors.note: Distribution risk and cast attachment risk identified

projections-labelled.note: Revenue projections clearly labelled as projections

leads-with-financials.note: Opens with budget and equity ask despite minimal detail

risk-factors.note: Two risks named: no festival pedigree and limited distribution interest

projections-labelled.note: With minimal financial detail provided, some revenue estimates presented without sufficient labelling

leads-with-financials.note: Leads with 12M budget, Eurimages, and 2M equity seek

risk-factors.note: Currency risk and multi-territory complexity both flagged
